failedAssertions.reason: After `Waiting for response...` began, killing the TUI-owned `codex app-server` subprocess caused Codex to auto-reconnect, but the composer never surfaced a failure, never cleared the waiting state, and never returned to a retryable idle shell.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented two deterministic TUI failure-path probes: stopping the local app listener before issue submission to verify overlay retry preservation, and killing the TUI-owned `codex app-server` during `Waiting for response...` to reproduce the stuck send-failure regression.
